display_name:
DeepMind's June 2025 text-to-image model with exceptional prompt adherence, capable of generating images with great detail, rich lighting, and few distracting artifacts. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect
description:
DeepMind's June 2025 text-to-image model with exceptional prompt adherence, capable of generating images with great detail, rich lighting, and few distracting artifacts. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect ratio of your image (1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4). 

Notes:
Non-English input will be translated first. Serves the `imagen-4.0-fast-generate-preview-06-06` model from Google Vertex, and has a maximum input of 480 tokens.
